stemHtml: What happens following the deployment of leading edge devices, while the trailing edge flaps remain retracted? Compared to the clean configuration…

options.a: C<sub>LMAX</sub> is increased, approach and landing speeds are decreased, and the nose down attitude gives the pilot a better view of the runway.
options.b: C<sub>LMAX</sub> is decreased, approach and landing speeds are increased, but the nose down attitude gives the pilot a better view of the runway.
options.c: C<sub>LMAX</sub> is increased, approach and landing speeds are decreased, but the nose-up attitude will give the pilot a poorer view of the runway.
options.d: C<sub>LMAX</sub> is decreased, approach and landing speeds are decreased, but the nose up attitude gives the pilot a poorer view of the runway.
